concerns.text: FR-001 (Download dataset) and SC-001 (≥95% scoring coverage) lack explicit task coverage. T013 downloads the dataset, but no task explicitly verifies the ≥95% success rate or handles the 'empty dataset' edge case mentioned in the spec's Edge Cases section. T018 handles download failures but not the specific coverage metric validation.

FR-005 (Generate scatter plot) and SC-002/SC-003 (Output r, p-value, significance) are partially covered by T034-T036, but no task explicitly implements the logic to 'measure against the significance threshold of 0.05' (SC-003) or output a 'statistical significance' flag as required by the 'AnalysisResult' entity definition in the spec. T033 saves results but doesn't specify the significance flag logic.

T014 assigns 'filter non-English/gibberish' to `anxiety_scoring.py`. The spec (US-1) describes this as a 'preprocessing step' logically distinct from scoring. While T014 covers the action, the task description conflates the module responsibility, potentially violating the clean separation implied by the spec's 'preprocessing step' phrasing. Consider splitting into a dedicated preprocessing task or clarifying the module's dual role.
